title: selaginella sambasensis
intro: Selaginella sambasensis, also known as Sambas spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, which is a group of small, non-vascular plants often referred to as "resurrection plants" due to their ability to survive in extreme conditions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Research has shown that Selaginella sambasensis has various health benefits, including its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Selaginella sambasensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
